channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Bitcoin's long-term holder supply approaches record high, breaking multi-year downtrend
item.description: Long-term holder supply has surged by more than 2 million coins to 16.3 million BTC during the current bear market.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Internet Computer drops 1.6%, leading index lower
item.description: Hedera (HBAR), down 1.3% from Wednesday, joined Internet Computer (ICP) as an underperformer.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘less aggressive demand’ may lead to months of consolidation: Analysis
item.description: Bitcoin demand and ETF flows weaken as BTC struggles below $80,000, raising risks of prolonged consolidation or a drop toward $65,000.

item.title: Stablecoins retain the edge over tokenized money market funds, JPMorgan says
item.description: The bank said tokenized money market funds account for only about 5% of the broader stablecoin universe despite offering yield.

item.title: Terraform Accuses Jane Street of Leveraging Secret Telegram Group
item.description: New allegations claim that Jane Street made use of a private backchannel with Terraform insiders before Terra's collapse.

item.title: Jane Street accused of using Terra Telegram backchannel before UST crash
item.description: The private Telegram backchannel allegedly allowed Jane Street to unwind hundreds of millions in potential exposure “mere hours before” the Terra ecosystem’s $40 billion collapse.

item.title: Boerse Stuttgart taps SocGen, flatexDEGIRO for EU blockchain settlement push
item.description: Boerse Stuttgart’s Seturion has partnered with Societe Generale, SG-FORGE and flatexDEGIRO to build a pan-European blockchain securities settlement system.

item.title: Morning Minute: SpaceX Files for IPO, Shares Surprising BTC Portfolio
item.description: SpaceX is up over 100% on its BTC holdings. Hyperliquid is decoupling from crypto majors. And Ethereum is leaning hard into privacy.

item.title: Fed seeks input on limited payment accounts after Trump order
item.description: The US Federal Reserve proposed a limited “skinny” payment account framework for fintech and crypto firms and called for a temporary pause on Tier 3 applications.

item.title: HYPE Jumps Double Digits as Hyperliquid ETFs Add $25.5M
item.description: Hyperliquid’s HYPE logged double-digit gains on the day, as ETF demand outpaced the token's supply reduction mechanism.

item.title: It's not all HYPE: Privacy and quantum-resistant coins advance as bitcoin marks time
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 21, 2026

item.title: The $6 billion expiration countdown: Traders pile into $82,000 bitcoin calls ahead of May 29 expiry
item.description: Deribit’s bitcoin open interest has overtaken BlackRock’s IBIT as traders brace for a showdown between $75K max pain and $80K call positioning.

item.title: HYPE leads crypto rebound as traders position for volatility breakout
item.description: Bitcoin and ether stabilized as derivatives activity rebounded, HYPE rose for a fifth straight day and options traders positioned for a breakout.

item.title: OSL Strengthens Asia’s Digital Asset Ecosystem with Listing of State-Supervised Gold-Backed Stablecoin USDKG
item.description: OSL Group (863.HK) (OSL), a global stablecoin payment and trading platform, today announced that its Hong Kong-licensed digital asset exchange OSL HK has officially listed USDKG, the gold-backed stablecoin issued by the Kyrgyz Republic.

item.title: A crypto whale has made a $224,000 bet that XRP's price stays perfectly flat through June
item.description: The trader collected about $224,500 in premiums and will keep the full amount if XRP remains close to $1.40.

item.title: TradFi giant IG to expand crypto trading across Europe through Bitpanda
item.description: The London-listed company is broadening its digital asset offering after introducing spot crypto trading for U.K. retail customers last year.

item.title: Silvergate’s Fraher breaks silence on settlement with Gensler’s SEC
item.description: Former Silvergate executive Kate Fraher said the rule that prevented her from sharing her side of the story was unconstitutional. It was finally lifted by the SEC this week.

item.title: Tax evaders are trying ‘novel digital assets’ to dodge authorities: Chainalysis
item.description: Italian authorities uncovered a tax evasion scheme in which an individual allegedly used Bitcoin Ordinals and the BRC-20 token standard to generate and conceal $1.1 million.

item.title: Syndicate Labs winds down after 5 years, citing shrinking rollup market
item.description: The Ethereum rollup market is dominated by Arbitrum and Base, which have a combined 68% market share, according to L2Beat.

item.title: Binance launches SpaceX pre-IPO perps amid $2 trillion valuation bets
item.description: Binance looks to democratize pre-IPO markets, starting with SpaceX perpetual futures.

item.title: SEC seeks public comment as it weighs prediction market ETFs
item.description: Bitwise, Roundhill Investments and GraniteShares had their prediction market ETF applications put on hold by the SEC earlier this month.

item.title: Don't call us just a WLFI treasury company, says AI Financial
item.description: The company says it is building a broader fintech, tokenization and digital infrastructure business, but its latest SEC filing shows WLFI still dominates the balance sheet.

item.title: BREAKING: 🇮🇳 Binance says India has no law restricting crypto withdrawals. Yet most domestic exchanges still block them, citing money laundering fears. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE1ZRTBfSTkwbE56Q2JZa0YtM3JwUVJ6OG15NXRYMjU5NVQ0ajk2ckd5ZW82MEdRYUgxRjlzcnRHQk8teHQ1enY1MEtDTVhXUVN0cnZ1MGE3bk4wVGlCMVUzU1JxNA?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: 🇮🇳 Binance says Indi…

item.title: Here's why bitcoin turned lower from the 200-day average
item.description: BTC recently turned lower from the 200-day average, a barometer of long-term trends. CryptoQuant explains why.

item.title: Hyperliquid ETFs surprise with 50% volume jump after slow launch
item.description: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says crypto and traditional assets are trading down while Hyperliquid is up, leading to a boon for ETFs tied to the token.

item.title: Map Protocol token plummets 96% after a quadrillion token mint exploit
item.description: The attacker tricked the Butter Network cross-chain bridge into minting millions more tokens than the legitimate supply of MAPO.

item.title: Bitcoin treasury Nakamoto plans reverse stock split to save ailing share price
item.description: Shares in Nakamoto closed Wednesday at 16 cents. They are down more than 99% from May last year, when the stock traded above $25.

item.title: ⚠️ ALERT: BITCOIN JUST FLASHED A MAJOR 2022 BEAR MARKET WARNING SIGNAL Bitcoin was rejected at its 200-day moving average near $82K, a setup that CryptoQuant says closely mirrors the March 2022 bear market rally that preceded another m - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5sMkpzWkJkVGhIX090QnBrdFoxSWN6MllCNEZWWXJ6QnBfTXN0NkhVWnVDQXZ1X3N6Ul9lLTNZT1NJaGFhVGZmTERxYnhTRTZMeUxMZmN4eEtoMlp3VElhTQ?oc=5" target="_blank">⚠️ ALERT: BITCOIN JUST FLASHED A MAJ…

item.title: SpaceX reveals larger-than-expected Bitcoin holdings in IPO filing
item.description: SpaceX is expected to go public next month, which would make its 18,712 Bitcoin holdings rank seventh among public companies.

item.title: Bitcoin Firm Nakamoto Plots 1-for-40 Stock Split Following 99% Price Plunge
item.description: Bitcoin treasury company Nakamoto aims to massively reduce its share count as it seeks a price of at least $1 to regain Nasdaq compliance.

item.title: FBI's Fake Token Sting Leads to 18 Crypto Fraud Charges - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiV0FVX3lxTE5OdTFGWXRuMU5adHZwalNlRzJ5THExdU5aQWpRYmkxVmxidE04aEhGZVMxRm5Zb2dJV21aWVVDc0VKQ0xac0xoa1lndUtWQzdMVHBYdGtldw?oc=5" target="_blank">FBI's Fake Token Sting Leads to 18 Crypto Fraud …

item.title: There's a new class in crypto: the revenue chains. The leaders are Hyperliquid & Solana. Both do some overlapping things, and some different things. Both have exceptional communities, usage, use cases, etc. I think that both will rise together, just as iOS and - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTE9PU3FoNFROcWlWdmhxYXRjQ1I5OUN1SXRrZUJvWHdXamFzemo5bm1uUHlLY1B5RjRLWEUxVGlsY3c1U1hTdGQ0blc3clZjNEVtVHRwcWZrZ0FUWVhXYVE?oc=5" target="_blank">There's a new class in crypto: the reve…

item.title: OFAC Sanctions Sinaloa Cartel Fentanyl Trafficking and Crypto Laundering Network
item.description: Summary The Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctioned more than a dozen individuals and entities… The post OFAC Sanctions Sinaloa Cartel Fentanyl Trafficking and Crypto Laundering Network appeared firs…

item.title: Shai-Hulud: What to Know About the Malware Spreading Through Software Pipelines
item.description: The Shai-Hulud supply-chain malware campaign is exploiting the automated systems developers trust to publish software safely.

item.title: Polymarket moves to list parlays while SEC seeks public input on prediction market ETFs
item.description: The "combinatorial outcome contracts" would resolve if every part of an underlying contract resolved, according to a filing.

item.title: Key Bitcoin price metric used by bulls falls to six-week low, but there’s a silver lining
item.description: Profit-taking by Bitcoin traders pushed the Coinbase BTC premium to a six-week low, but demand from longer-term traders put a clear support under the range lows.

item.title: Bitcoin miners tied to AI rise as Nvidia posts big earnings beat and strong outlook
item.description: Nvidia's stronger-than-expected results and bullish AI outlook lifted crypto mining stocks tied to data center and high-performance computing demand, even as the chipmaker's shares fell due to growth concerns.

item.title: SpaceX IPO Filing Shows Musk Building an AI and Space Infrastructure Giant
item.description: The rocket maker’s IPO filing outlines billions in AI spending, Starship development, and Elon Musk’s effort to combine launch systems, satellite internet, social media, and artificial intelligence under one company.

item.title: Federal Reserve proposes limited master accounts long pursued by crypto firms
item.description: The U.S. Fed issued a revised proposal on the structure of payment accounts, taking the next step to build on an earlier pitch for so-called skinny accounts.

item.title: Missouri AG sues crypto ATM operator CoinFlip, alleging fraud
item.description: The lawsuit followed an investigation by Missouri authorities into several crypto ATM companies that involve allegations of “deceptive fee structures” and scams.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO Filing Reveals $1.45 Billion Bitcoin Position
item.description: SpaceX is gearing up for what's likely to be a blockbuster IPO, and Elon Musk's aerospace and AI firm holds more Bitcoin than expected.

item.title: Time to say something out loud. The first era of Bankless has concluded. A six year collaboration between David and myself exploring crypto, defi, and maximizing Ethereum. We're in the second era now. In this second era I'm planning to take more of a backse - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE8yUVdFaUJMNVJyMEk1WU1QbTdLbkVEOGRvYjZaY2IxUm5LNXNHajZBZG1lTFpIOHRYdjhhT3Q1NTdERTYxNG5fNlRQOXN3WTVYSmxVdUJ2MWlWcHR3QWNXVQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Time to say something out loud. The …

item.title: Coinbase expands branded stablecoin infrastructure business with Flipcash USDF launch
item.description: The launch marks Coinbase’s latest push into white-label stablecoin infrastructure for businesses building branded digital payment and settlement systems.

item.title: Elon Musk's SpaceX held 18,712 bitcoin at fair value of $1.29 billion at end of Q1, IPO filing shows
item.description: The rocket and satellite company is looking to go public at a valuation of more than $1.5 trillion.

item.title: Bitcoin rallies through $77K despite spot BTC ETF outflows topping $2B
item.description: Bitcoin finds footing above $77,000 despite investors’ worry over BigTech earnings results and $2 billion outflows from the BTC ETFs.

item.title: Crypto Backing or Trump Pump? Fairshake PAC Claims Primary Victories
item.description: Fairshake said six primary victories on Tuesday revealed a “powerful bipartisan mandate” for pro-crypto policies. But other factors appear to have been at play.

item.title: JUST IN: SpaceX IPO filing reveals the company holds 18,712 Bitcoin at a cost basis of roughly $35,000 per BTC. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE5KdFIzVzRFWnFObWUxRUo2cnhvWVVKbTdlZWhtUkhwNVBjZklPekpwTDFRQ3VTVERGOUlTeE51QzdTdU1qUm5LWE1aXzRiWTFrdkw4RFJHY241MHF6REFsYw?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: SpaceX IPO filing reveals t…

item.title: BREAKING: SpaceX reports they own 18,712 bitcoin worth more than $1.45 billion — SEC filing 👀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE5NUkJtSDdCa01mWnd3R3dWVjYwRV9TVTVmZkJhT3dtMEdYbDB3ZzRIa1NVaDliZ3cyaWppeGNsZjV5M0FEa2o1NjZ1eGI0X0RiTlZXNWE2dS1udTJ1SmQ0NU1Menljc1E?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: SpaceX reports th…

item.title: SEC’s ‘Crypto Mom’ to join law school, signaling end of time at regulator
item.description: Hester Peirce will become an associate professor at a Virginia law school some 18 months after her term at the SEC expired, leaving another empty seat in the agency’s leadership.

item.title: Artificial Womb for Growing Mammals Is at 'One-Yard Line', Says Colossal CEO
item.description: De-extinction startup Colossal claims it has built an artificial womb capable of supporting mammal development—and it's nearly complete.

item.title: THIS IS ACTUALLY INSANE!🤯 The FBI launched its own crypto token last year just to trap the scammers. They were sick of pump and dumps. So they built a real token with a real site and real branding, called it NexFundAI, and waited to see who would show u - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5sbHNyYklfYmlya1FpNUJ6eW5HRHN6blRXdGZIX2lWRUtvcGlITF9jVk5jTlBjQkRGQVEtdGcyNWZXUEljblNqal9ZTFFoYTQ2aE9OeTdGUGxTeVJjYmxsZmNn?oc=5" target="_blank">THIS IS ACTUALLY INSANE!🤯 The FBI…

item.title: US Treasury Sanctions Sinaloa Cartel Over Crypto-Fueled Fentanyl Trafficking
item.description: Members linked to the Sinaloa Cartel responsible for turning cash from drug proceeds into crypto were added to the sanctions list.

item.title: Price predictions 5/20: BTC, ETH, BNB, XRP, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA, ZEC, BCH
item.description: Bitcoin looks on track for a rally toward $80,000 while HYPE, ZEC and a handful of altcoins are pushing toward their range highs.

item.title: Qwen 3.7 Max Preview: What Alibaba's New AI Gets Right and Where It Falls Short
item.description: Alibaba's Qwen 3.7 Max landed on Arena AI five days before the Cloud Summit and earned its spot. We tested it to see if the preview was as good as it seemed.

item.title: OpenAI Set to File for IPO Within Days, Targeting September Listing: WSJ
item.description: ChatGPT maker OpenAI is reportedly targeting a September public debut after the Elon Musk lawsuit dismissal clears legal obstacles.

item.title: Securitize posts record revenue in the first quarter as it gears up for public listing
item.description: The tokenization platform reported record quarterly revenue but continued to post losses as it invested in growth and public-company preparations tied to its merger with Cantor Equity Partners II.

item.title: Latest Congressional swing at crypto tax reform would direct IRS to review de minimis exemptions
item.description: The newest version of the Parity Act updates language around payment stablecoins and directs the IRS to report on how a de minimis exemption might work.

item.title: Google's Stock Fell on Its Best I/O in Years. Here's Why BofA Is Still Buying
item.description: Bank of America analysts believe Alphabet is still a buy, seeing potential 10% upside in stock price following Google I/O 2026.

item.title: Fairshake PAC’s $20M backing pays off in 3 US state primaries
item.description: Five Republicans and one Democrat won or went to runoffs following primaries in Georgia, Alabama and Kentucky after a crypto-backed PAC and its affiliates spent a combined $20 million on media and ads.

item.title: Prediction markets firms take heat in Senate Commerce hearing scrutinizing surge
item.description: Sports betting on firms such as Kalshi was the focus of questions over advertising to children, cheating from athletes and undermining regulated gaming.
